name: ui-surface-detector
question: Does this project have a UI / runtime surface that ARIA could instrument, and what kind?

schema.surface_kind: tauri-desktop | electron-desktop | web-spa | react-native | flutter | mobile-native | backend-service | cli-tool | none
schema.evidence: array of strings (the file/dependency markers that drove the classification)

fallback: Manually inspect the project's manifests (package.json, Cargo.toml, pubspec.yaml) and the presence of src-tauri/, index.html, and bin/ directories. Detection rules are documented in the README and in spec ARIA-02 acceptance criterion 1.

provenance.note: Universal Starter Set member. Consumed by /0-uldf-ldis-intake Phase 1 risk profiling and /0-uldf-ldis-plan Phase 4 testability gate (Leg B of ARIA's four-leg detection machinery). Also used by the aria-status oracle (ARIA-01) as the surface-detection helper. Filesystem stat + small file reads only — never executes project scripts.
